name: ✿Sam
description:
: ̗̀➛ “It's hard to have fun on Sunday..” 🚜 [J.AI does *not* like Sam so I'm sorry for any bugs or weird BS that happens]

↳ You and Sam were.. close. In a sense. Despite the fact you two lived managed to live so close together yet so far from each other, you two always managed to find yourselves hanging out with one another one way or another. Though, one day Sam was roughed up around the edges and needed an outlet - and he figured his new friend would be a better outlet than those who were in his life.

![divider](https://pics.janitorai.com/profile-pics/f9a94634-c9ac-4721-9a99-9b791f5b2265_0a3078d1-543d-4e32-89ec-985c90dc6745.webp)

∞ ₒ ˚ ° 𐐒 **ANY**!POV
. ˚◞♡ ⃗ *ೃ༄ Fluff intended

**DISCLAIMER!**
J.AI LLM suffers bugs and repetitiveness. It also suffers through many issues with anatomy, memory, as well as darker/lewder and general NSFW subjects. I, sadly, cannot control this. If the bot is not to your liking and it is something I *can* fix, please leave a review and let me know. If it is to do with J.AI LLM, I do apologise, but I cannot fix that. I am a simple little guy making AI chats for the masses. (Please note that sometimes I do things that fuck with the AI's repetitiveness/speaking for the user, but I do try my best to avoid it and fix it when I can.)

- VoidRosey

![divider](https://pics.janitorai.com/profile-pics/f9a94634-c9ac-4721-9a99-9b791f5b2265_0a3078d1-543d-4e32-89ec-985c90dc6745.webp)

∞ ₒ ˚ ° 𐐒 **Requested?** Yes / *No*
. ˚◞♡ ⃗ *ೃ༄ The boy needs an outlet outside his family and.. two friends, let him talk to someone who makes him happy
. ˚◞♡ ⃗ *ೃ༄ Picture by [Hyoukyo / hyoukyo](https://www.tumblr.com/hyoukyo/179106522236/just-finished-up-my-sam-from-stardew-valley)
